candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is the explicit D&A component shown beneath COGS/cost of revenues. However, the selected parent COGS row ('Cost of goods sold') appears to be a total that already includes this line, supported by the nearby component structure with 'Other Cost of Sales'. Adding it separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: COGS-related D&A label, but no visible values and it appears as a sub-component under cost of revenues rather than a separate same-level operating line.
COGS-related D&A label, but no visible values and it appears to be a component within the selected COGS bucket, not a separate add-on line.
COGS-related D&A label, but no visible values and it appears to be a component within the selected COGS bucket, not a separate add-on line.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the parent total 'Cost of goods sold'. The excerpt shows a clear parent-child structure where COGS/cost of revenues is decomposed into D&A plus other cost of sales. Therefore COGS-related D&A is already embedded in the selected COGS row and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This D&A row appears under both 'Sales and marketing expenses' and 'Administration expenses'. In each case the selected parent row appears to be the total, with D&A plus 'Other ... Expense' summing to the parent. Therefore it is already embedded in the selected XSGA component rows and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is the D&A component under the selected R&D parent row. The selected 'Research and development expenditure' appears to be a total that already includes this amount, and that same R&D parent is also selected for XRD, so adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting.
Potential SG&A-related D&A row, but no visible values and it appears as a sub-component under selected SG&A parent rows rather than a separate same-level line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Potential SG&A-related D&A row, but no visible values and it appears to be a nested component, not a separate add-on outside the selected SG&A parents.
Potential R&D-related D&A row, but no visible values and it appears to be a sub-component of the selected R&D parent. Also, the selected R&D row is already in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Potential R&D amortization component, but no visible values and it appears nested within the selected R&D parent row rather than separate from it.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combined total of 'Sales and marketing expenses', 'Administration expenses', and 'Research and development expenditure'. The excerpt shows each of these as parent totals with D&A sub-components beneath them. Because the D&A rows are embedded within the selected parent rows, no separate XSGA_DA row should be added.
